case_title: GERALD SPOLTER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) "FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST" SERVED AUG-30-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-07-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF GERALD SPOLTER DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY SPOLTER, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF GERALD SPOLTER. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN & D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
